content.text: Problem statement 2: QM modules does not used EM
In local projects, only Safety modules used EM. But in Aurix PF we need to make all modules shall report error via EM
Proposed architecture: Error logging - Decision matrix - XC-CT China - Docupedia (bosch.com)

items: SoC side only supports Safe Error Memory
As an next step we can analyze VCU SoC side EM implementation

content.text: VCU EM supports for storing QM data.  EM User can define the EM log file size in script according to  VCU EM design. The log file size is 10M in VCU manual. It have backup and overwrite mechanism.
Due to difference of architecture on SoC side between VCU EM and Zeekr, we can’t reuse VCU EM  without adaption.
VCU EM functionality supports parsing coredump file of QNX / tombstone of android and store qnx slog, but I think these are not necessary for us now.  We can deal with these functions in the end.
At first we can only integrate function of storing QM data from SCC. But EM have dependencies on other system components.
Below adaptions are necessary if store SCC data via  EM:

items: SUSD dynamic lib, strategy and interface different.
